title: centaurea cadmea
intro: Centaurea cadmea, also known as the Cretan centaury, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is native to Greece and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea cadmea include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Centaurea cadmea is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can be used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
